itemListElement.reviewBody:
Teachers are extremely rude only few teachers are polite....I studied in this school from 6th class....And from very first day I faced problems....I hate this school ....
Don't get ur admission in this school....if u want to save ur childhood days....

itemReviewed.name: Shree Thakurdwara Balika Vidyalaya - Patel Nagar 1,Patel Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Myself Priya I took admission in this school in 8 th grade i have studied for almost 5 years in this school and now soon will be completing 12th this school is a great institution to admit your daughter in. It provides ample opportunities for growth of ur ward moreover throughout the year many group activities are also organised which helps to improve your Childs skills and compentencies to work among different people and still shine they also try to motivate students by appreciating even a slightest win teachers here are very understanding and give their best to provide the most of their knowledge to the students all together you can surely go for this school if your daughter is looking for  a nice school to complete further studies
XII-I student
2023-24

itemReviewed.name: Shree Thakurdwara Balika Vidyalaya - Patel Nagar 1,Patel Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Hello everyone, I am Prakriti of class 12 nd I'm studying here from last 6 yrs. I am feeling very proud to be a part of Shri Thakurdwara Balika Vidyalaya.  It is one of the best school for girls that I have studied.
Teachers are qualified, well educated as well as very supportive.This school is not only provide education but also provide many other activities like dance, singing, painting, sports, fashion desinging as well as it also provide training of army bagpipe band

It provide many opportunities for students to show their talents nd each nd every student should be encouraged by school's management.

THANK YOU🥰

itemListElement.reviewBody: In this school I learn more and more . itemReviewed.name: Shree Thakurdwara Balika Vidyalaya - Patel Nagar 1,Patel Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
For becoming successful in ur life...we... usually opt better education...and in...now days....no school is better than *Shri thakurdwara balika vidyalaya* as there r so helpful teachers who teach us our syllabus as well as basic manners also  which was important for our whole life
And teachers are very helpful and used  motivate and  maintain equality with every student ...
We can score good marks without any frustration and depression in studies....
*My own experience is very good here*....now it's my last year but still....I can't forget the memories which I made with this school teachers there are so many my favourite teachers....who usually motivated me to achieve better in my life there non measurable blessings are very delightful
I can't express my experience in words....
But still.....I just wanna to say it was my one of the best choice in my life... towards my studies....
Aastha Mishra
( Xll )
Student of thakurdwara school

itemReviewed.name: Shree Thakurdwara Balika Vidyalaya - Patel Nagar 1,Patel Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Shri thakurdwara Balika vidyalay, an outstanding school for girls education in city of Ghaziabad, everyone performances is very good. The school provide high quality education regular evolution ensure student progress while educating the security provide a safe learning environment. The school give us experiential learning opportunity that help us to understand ,not only education school also promote the sports dancing and singing skills of children and students receive cash prize also an achieving any competition and academic to fill in them with motivation and inspiration. About teaching teachers are very amazing they you simple technique to make it easier to understand the concept by the student. All teachers are very helpful and kind to the student, teachers also put all their strength to improve the student result. I too have many favourite teachers that just can't count. Medical facilities are also provides in the school.

My experience here is unexplainable, the best  school for girls in Ghaziabad .

board:
CBSE

Girls
